  statistically significant dose-dependent weight loss of up to 22.7% at Week 48. At Week 48 for
  CT-388 24 mg: 95.7% achieved >=5% weight loss, 87.0% >=10%, 47.8% >=20%, and 26.1% >=30%. Among
  participants with prediabetes at baseline, 73% achieved normoglycemia.; Percent weight loss from baseline to Week 48; https://diabetesjournals.org/diabetes/article/75/Supplement_1/2813-LB/167971/2813-LB-CT-388-a-cAMP-Signal-Biased-GLP-1-GIP

  with prediabetes at baseline, 7.5% on placebo achieved normoglycemia. No arm-level placebo %
